blended.narrative: Sundown Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Mild temps with highs near 62°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
Friday: light drizzle, highs of 44°F, winds around 22 mph.
Sunday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
